rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.058, which governs local health education and health care advisory councils for school districts. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district or the governing body of an open-enrollment charter school may establish and appoint members to a local health education and health care advisory council
_note: No conflict. Educ. Code §38.058 addresses school-based health advisory councils and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
